nodes.label: sanad-lawyer-comms.png
nodes.description: Screenshot of the Sanad app's Communications Log (سجل الاتصالات) view — a unified feed of lawyer-client interactions including calls, emails, meetings, messages, and internal notes. RTL Arabic layout with card-based list, color-coded communication-type icons, filter tabs, and a right-side navigation sidebar.

properties.view_subtitle: مكالمات، بريد، اجتماعات، وملاحظات مع العملاء
properties.target_audience: Saudi lawyers and small legal practices

nodes.label: Communications Log View
nodes.description: A unified chronological feed of all lawyer-client touchpoints (calls, emails, meetings, messages, internal notes) with filter tabs, case/client tagging, incoming/outgoing status, and a total count badge. Equivalent to a CRM activity timeline within the Sanad legal platform.

nodes.label: Sanad Navigation Sidebar
nodes.description: Right-side vertical navigation sidebar present in the Sanad app, listing: Dashboard, Clients, Cases Board, Communications (active), Documents, Invoices, Compliance (badge:4), Tasks (badge:9), Deep Work, Calendar.

nodes.label: Communication Entry Card
nodes.description: Reusable card component in the communications log. Each card shows: communication type icon (color-coded), title, linked client, linked case, summary text, date/time, duration (calls), and incoming/outgoing direction indicator.

nodes.label: Lawyer-Client CRM Feature
nodes.description: CRM-style capability within Sanad where each communication entry is linked to a specific client and case, enabling context-aware tracking of all touchpoints per legal matter. Supports logging calls, sending emails, scheduling meetings, and writing internal notes.

nodes.label: Add Communication Action (تسجيل اتصال)
nodes.description: Primary action button '+ تسجيل اتصال' (+ Log Communication) in the top-left of the Communications Log view, allowing lawyers to record a new interaction.
